metadata.description: Marketplace seller-store skills for OpenClaw — a standalone Walmart Marketplace (US) suite.

plugins.name: e-commerce-skill
plugins.description: Standalone Walmart Marketplace OpenClaw skill suite: a walmart-seller hub (own-keys auth, condensed API map, account-safety guardrails, runnable Python helpers) + 10 spokes (onboarding, listings, seo, wfs, advertising, buybox-pricing, pro-seller, customer-targeting, fulfillment-ops, product-research). Sandbox-verified.
